name: Pun-chee
description:
A Bandit Seraph roid shield that generally outperforms a comparable purple roid shield with the same components. It is a strong fit for melee builds that want solid damage without relying on a more specialized legendary.

Its shorter recharge delay can make it harder to keep the shield empty, which lowers roid uptime and can reduce peak melee damage compared with some other named roid shields.
notes: It can spawn with a Maliwan capacitor for elemental resistance or a Torgue capacitor for explosive resistance. These Seraph versions do not use the standard resistance prefixes such as Grounded, Inflammable, Alkaline, or Blast Proof.

special.description: It has no exclusive special effect beyond its part rolls.
special.title: You wanna go, asshole?

abilities: When depleted, melee attacks deal bonus Roid Damage.
